testcase.name: testTotalPriceUpdatesWithQuantity

failure.message: Total price should change when quantity changes did not expect [$22.00] but found [$22.00]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Total price should change when quantity changes did not expect [$22.00] but found [$22.00] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failEquals(Assert.java:1594) at org.testng.Assert.assertNotEqualsImpl(Assert.java:157) at org.testng.Assert.assertNotEquals(Assert.java:2217) at testcase.name: testEventCountMatchesLabel

failure.message: Events found label should be visible expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Events found label should be visible expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
